$comment: Scoop manifest for QiloBack — Windows package manager support. Lives here as a template; the canonical copy is hosted in the delixon-labs/scoop-bucket repository (or directly in this repo's gh-pages branch, depending on hosting choice). Placeholders 0.5.4 and ef2205ea64116dd017ee4cac964e68f82c27a2937f0ae30fba699c3a47bf24c3 are replaced by the release-cli-binary workflow on tag push.
description: Backend manufacturer — DSL → FastAPI + PostgreSQL generator.
